name: POLICY-BUG-7
title: Version drift between spec.md (1.3.0) and contract.md (1.1.0) with no rationale
description: spec.md frontmatter says version: 1.3.0 and feature.json says 1.3.0, but contract.md frontmatter says version: 1.1.0. Per spec-rules.md section 3 'Lifecycle and Ownership', version bumps should be intentional. Either contract.md is genuinely at 1.1.0 (independent versioning) and that should be documented, or it has drifted. There is no policy stating whether spec/contract versions evolve together or independently. Location: .claude/features/policy/docs/spec/spec.md line 3 vs .claude/features/policy/docs/spec/contract.md line 3.
